triaged_vulnerabilities.title: Critical Buffer Overflow in parse_input()
triaged_vulnerabilities.root_cause: The parse_input function uses strcpy() without bounds checking, allowing attackers to overflow the destination buffer with crafted input.
triaged_vulnerabilities.prerequisites: Attacker can control input to parse_input function
reproduction_steps: 1. Create input string longer than destination buffer (1024 bytes)

triaged_vulnerabilities.title: Critical Use-After-Free in cleanup_session()
triaged_vulnerabilities.root_cause: Session data is accessed after being freed, leading to use-after-free condition that can be exploited for arbitrary code execution.
triaged_vulnerabilities.prerequisites: Attacker can trigger session cleanup with controlled session data
reproduction_steps: 1. Create session with controlled data structure
3. Observe use-after-free crash when freed memory is accessed

triaged_vulnerabilities.title: High Severity Format String in log_error()
triaged_vulnerabilities.root_cause: User-controlled format string passed directly to printf() allows format string attacks.
triaged_vulnerabilities.prerequisites: Attacker can control error messages passed to log_error()
reproduction_steps: 1. Craft malicious format string with %n specifiers
2. Trigger error condition that logs the malicious string

triaged_vulnerabilities.title: Medium Severity Integer Overflow in allocate_buffer()
triaged_vulnerabilities.root_cause: Integer overflow in size calculation (count * item_size) can wrap around, leading to undersized allocation and subsequent heap overflow.
triaged_vulnerabilities.prerequisites: Attacker can control count and item_size parameters
reproduction_steps: 1. Call allocate_buffer with large count and item_size values
3. Observe undersized allocation and potential heap corruption

triaged_vulnerabilities.title: Medium Severity Null Pointer Dereference in process_request()
triaged_vulnerabilities.root_cause: Function does not validate request parameter before dereferencing, leading to null pointer dereference when called with NULL.
triaged_vulnerabilities.attack_vector: API call with null request parameter
triaged_vulnerabilities.prerequisites: Attacker can call process_request with NULL parameter
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe segmentation fault when NULL pointer is dereferenced

remediation_priority.reason: Critical severity, high exploitability, RCE impact
Critical severity, high exploitability, memory corruption
Medium severity, integer overflow with heap impact
